author: y4rr
content: Observation: roll<T> in ferrotorch-core/src/ops/tensor_ops.rs:167 calls data_vec() then reconstructs Tensor::from_storage with requires_grad=false (line 202). No grad_fn registered, no backward. PRE-FLIGHT contract: 'roll backward trap — eval-mode forward should still work'. Proceeding with eval-mode value-parity test only; will document in code comment that training-mode breaks at roll boundary. New issue should be filed for #1014 'Add backward for roll'.
